title: No More Phantoms
description: Removes phantoms from the game and provides an alternative crafting recipe for phantom membranes.
body:
## Need help? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2698cavvue).

## Overview
**No More Phantoms** is a data pack that removes phantoms from your world without removing any in-game functionality.

Because players cannot kill phantoms to obtain phantom membranes, the pack adds a recipe to craft them instead:

![Phantom membrane recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f44dab23e7f622c63e527995f56641acb77edff.png)
